title: Computational Thinking Skills
summary: 9618 AS — decomposition, abstraction, pattern recognition, and algorithm design before coding.
learningObjectives: Define decomposition, abstraction, and pattern recognition.
Apply computational thinking to problem breakdown.
Evaluate solutions for efficiency and correctness.

simpleExplanation.title: Thinking like a computer scientist
simpleExplanation.summary: Computational thinking breaks problems into manageable parts, hides unnecessary detail, and finds reusable patterns.
steps: Abstraction: focus on essential features only.
Algorithm design: ordered steps before syntax.

sections.content: **Computational thinking** (9.1) precedes **algorithms** (9.2) and **programming** (11.x). Paper 2 rewards **structured problem breakdown** in prose answers.
